glossary.requiredParams: orderType, orderNumber, ticketNumber, url, siteId, xDays
glossary.subject: Spark ticket notification for {{mappings.orderType}} (No: {{mappings.orderNumber}}, Ticket: {{mappings.ticketNumber}}, Days away: {{mappings.xDays}} & Site id: {{mappings.siteId}})
glossary.subtitle:
Hello,

Spark ticket {{mappings.ticketNumber}} implementation is {{mappings.xDays}} days away for the following {{mappings.orderType}} order. Please ensure the spark ticket is approved and authorized before the start of change window.

Order no: {{ mappings.orderNumber }}
Site id: {{ mappings.siteId }}
Ticket number: {{ mappings.ticketNumber }}

Please check order {{ mappings.url }} for more details.

Thank You
glossary.footerText: This is an automated email. Please do not reply to this email.
